scripts.runtime:local:up: docker compose --env-file infra/runtime/env/local.env -f infra/runtime/compose.base.yml -f infra/runtime/compose.local.yml up -d
scripts.runtime:local:down: docker compose --env-file infra/runtime/env/local.env -f infra/runtime/compose.base.yml -f infra/runtime/compose.local.yml down
scripts.build: pnpm run gen && turbo run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run gen && turbo run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run gen && turbo run test
scripts.smoke:local: pnpm --dir apps/api run db:migrate && SMOKE_ENV=local SMOKE_START_WEB_SERVER=1 playwright test -c tests/smoke/playwright.config.ts
scripts.verify: pnpm run gen && turbo run typecheck test build --concurrency=1 && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck:smoke
scripts.verify:full: pnpm verify && pnpm exec fallow dead-code --format compact && pnpm run doctor:diff
